name: open-pawn
displayName: Open Pawn — SA-MP & open.mp Compiler + Tools
description: Pawn language support for SA-MP & open.mp: syntax highlighting, snippets, autocomplete, hovers, go-to-definition, and a native pawncc compiler with diagnostics — on Windows, macOS (Apple Silicon/Intel), and Linux, no Wine on the Mac. A modern cross-platform replacement for Pawno / Qawno.

file.description: The .pwn file to compile. Defaults to the active file or the configured main script.

pawnOmp.compilerPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the native `pawncc` binary. If empty, the extension searches common locations (workspace `qawno/native/pawncc`, `qawno/pawncc`, `pawno/pawncc`, then `pawncc` on PATH).

pawnOmp.wineWrapperPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to a Wine `pawn-cc.sh` wrapper, used only when no native `pawncc` is found. If empty, the extension searches the workspace for `pawn-cc.sh` / `run-pawncc-wine.sh`.

pawnOmp.preferWine.description: Use the Wine wrapper even when a native compiler is available.

pawnOmp.mainScript.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative path to the main gamemode/script (e.g. `gamemodes/survival.pwn`). Used by the 'Compile Main Script' command and compile-on-save when set.

pawnOmp.includePaths.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative include directories passed to pawncc via `-i`. Non-existent paths are skipped.

pawnOmp.outputDir.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative directory for the compiled `.amx`. If empty, the `.amx` is written next to the source file.

pawnOmp.compileOnSave.description: Automatically compile when a Pawn file is saved.

pawnOmp.compileOnSaveTarget.markdownDescription: On save, compile the saved file itself (`currentFile`) or always compile the configured `#pawnOmp.mainScript#` (`mainScript`). Falls back to the current file if no main script is set.
